title: Sterling Bank of Asia Selects Infosys Finacle SaaS Platform for Banking Transformation
detailed_summary: Infosys Finacle, part of EdgeVerve Systems, a wholly-owned subsidiary of Infosys, announced that Sterling Bank of Asia selected the Infosys Finacle Software-as-a-Service platform for its transformation program. Sterling Bank plans to use Finacle Core Banking, Customer Data Hub, Trade Finance, and Origination solutions. The collaboration is expected to improve employee and customer experience, availability and reliability of banking services, operational automation and digitization, and support future growth. The document does not disclose deal value, duration, revenue impact, or implementation timeline.

key_facts.fact: Sterling Bank of Asia selected the Infosys Finacle Software-as-a-Service platform for its transformation program.
Sterling Bank of Asia opted to leverage Finacle Core Banking, Finacle Customer Data Hub, Finacle Trade Finance, and Finacle Origination solutions.

Sterling Bank expects the collaboration to enhance employee and customer experience, maintain high standards of availability and reliability, and reduce operational complexity through automation and digitization.
The SaaS-based deployment is expected to simplify technology operations and allow the bank to focus on strategic growth and innovation.
The cloud-hosted model is expected to help Sterling Bank scale seamlessly and on demand to support evolving business needs.

partnerships_or_deals.description: Sterling Bank of Asia selected Infosys Finacle Software-as-a-Service platform for its transformation program, including Finacle Core Banking, Customer Data Hub, Trade Finance, and Origination solutions.

products_or_platforms.name: Infosys Finacle Software-as-a-Service
products_or_platforms.description: Sterling Bank of Asia selected the Infosys Finacle SaaS platform for its next-generation banking transformation program.

important_text_spans.text: Sterling Bank of Asia (Sterling Bank), one of the most progressive banks in the Philippines, today announced the bank's decision to select Infosys Finacle Software-as-aService (SaaS) platform for its transformation program.
important_text_spans.reason: Supports the core client selection and transformation deal.

important_text_spans.text: Sterling Bank has opted to leverage the Finacle Core Banking, Finacle Customer Data Hub, Finacle Trade Finance, and Finacle Origination solutions for its requirements.
important_text_spans.reason: Identifies the Infosys Finacle solutions included in the engagement.

important_text_spans.text: Through this strategic collaboration with Infosys Finacle, Sterling Bank expects to enhance the experience of both employees and customers, maintain high standards of availability and reliability in its banking services, and reduce operational complexity through automation and digitization, thereby supporting its future growth.
important_text_spans.reason: States the expected business impact of the collaboration.

processing_notes: Deal value, duration, revenue impact, and implementation timeline were not disclosed. Generic Finacle background and safe harbor risk language were excluded.
